headlines.description: Borussia Dortmund cruised past relegated Holstein Kiel 3-0 on Saturday to finish fourth and snatch the last Champions League spot for next season
headlines.shortLinkText: Dortmund snatch last Champions League spot with win over Kiel in season finale

video.headline: Felix Nmecha slots in the goal for Borussia Dortmund

tracking.trackingName: SOC_One-Play (Felix Nmecha slots in the goal for Borussia Dortmund) 2025/05/17 ESHEET

events.name: 1. FC Union Berlin at FC Augsburg

headlines.description: Bayer Leverkusen came from a goal down to rescue a 2-2 draw at hosts Mainz 05 in the Bundesliga finale on Saturday and hand departing coach Xabi Alonso another record as they went two league seasons without an away defeat.
headlines.shortLinkText: Leverkusen set record with Alonso set to depart

video.headline: Mainz secure Europe with 2-2 draw vs Leverkusen

tracking.trackingName: SOC_FINAL_GAME_HIGHLIGHT (Mainz secure Europe with 2-2 draw vs Leverkusen.) 2025_5_17

headlines.description: Champions Bayern Munich crushed hosts Hoffenheim 4-0 in the Bundesliga finale on Saturday as record-breaking Harry Kane was crowned the league's top striker for a second straight season.
headlines.shortLinkText: Bayern end season with win; Kane top scorer

video.headline: Bayern thrash Hoffenheim on final day of Bundesliga season

tracking.trackingName: SOC_One-Play (TSG Hoffenheim vs. Bayern Munich - Game Highlights) 2025/05/17 ESHEET
